image:image.image:title: Bandit Brute STL — DnD Fantasy Axe Highway Robber Berserker Miniature 3D Print Tabletop
image:image.image:caption: The wall of muscle that comes out of the trees once the ambush is sprung. Bare-chested, scarred chest, war-axe held one-handed, the kind of bandit who treats armor like a recommendation.

image:image.image:title: Bandit Brute STL — DnD Fantasy Axe Highway Robber Berserker Miniature 3D Print Tabletop
image:image.image:caption: The wall of muscle that comes out of the trees once the ambush is sprung. Bare-chested, scarred chest, war-axe held one-handed, the kind of bandit who treats armor like a recommendation.

image:image.image:title: Bandit Brute STL — DnD Fantasy Axe Highway Robber Berserker Miniature 3D Print Tabletop
image:image.image:caption: The wall of muscle that comes out of the trees once the ambush is sprung. Bare-chested, scarred chest, war-axe held one-handed, the kind of bandit who treats armor like a recommendation.

image:image.image:title: Bandit Brute STL — DnD Fantasy Axe Highway Robber Berserker Miniature 3D Print Tabletop
image:image.image:caption: The wall of muscle that comes out of the trees once the ambush is sprung. Bare-chested, scarred chest, war-axe held one-handed, the kind of bandit who treats armor like a recommendation.

image:image.image:caption: The wall of muscle that comes out of the trees once the ambush is sprung. Bare-chested, scarred chest, war-axe held one-handed, the kind of bandit who treats armor like a recommendation.

image:image.image:title: Bandit Brute STL — DnD Fantasy Axe Highway Robber Berserker Miniature 3D Print Tabletop
image:image.image:caption: The wall of muscle that comes out of the trees once the ambush is sprung. Bare-chested, scarred chest, war-axe held one-handed, the kind of bandit who treats armor like a recommendation.

image:image.image:title: Bandit Captain STL — DnD Fantasy Highway Robber Leader Miniature 3D Print Tabletop
image:image.image:caption: The cool head of the gang — a former soldier turned outlaw. Twin blades on his hips, leather harness, burgundy cloak, and the calm of a man who has already counted the gold in your purse.

image:image.image:title: Bandit Captain STL — DnD Fantasy Highway Robber Leader Miniature 3D Print Tabletop
image:image.image:caption: The cool head of the gang — a former soldier turned outlaw. Twin blades on his hips, leather harness, burgundy cloak, and the calm of a man who has already counted the gold in your purse.

image:image.image:title: Bandit Captain STL — DnD Fantasy Highway Robber Leader Miniature 3D Print Tabletop
image:image.image:caption: The cool head of the gang — a former soldier turned outlaw. Twin blades on his hips, leather harness, burgundy cloak, and the calm of a man who has already counted the gold in your purse.

image:image.image:title: Bandit Captain STL — DnD Fantasy Highway Robber Leader Miniature 3D Print Tabletop
image:image.image:caption: The cool head of the gang — a former soldier turned outlaw. Twin blades on his hips, leather harness, burgundy cloak, and the calm of a man who has already counted the gold in your purse.

image:image.image:caption: The cool head of the gang — a former soldier turned outlaw. Twin blades on his hips, leather harness, burgundy cloak, and the calm of a man who has already counted the gold in your purse.

image:image.image:title: Bandit Captain STL — DnD Fantasy Highway Robber Leader Miniature 3D Print Tabletop
image:image.image:caption: The cool head of the gang — a former soldier turned outlaw. Twin blades on his hips, leather harness, burgundy cloak, and the calm of a man who has already counted the gold in your purse.

image:image.image:title: Bandit Crossbowman STL — DnD Fantasy Highway Robber Sniper Miniature 3D Print Tabletop
image:image.image:caption: The ambush starts here — a hooded marksman with a heavy crossbow, perched above the road waiting for the carts to roll into the kill-zone. The first bolt is yours; the rest is the gang's.

image:image.image:title: Bandit Crossbowman STL — DnD Fantasy Highway Robber Sniper Miniature 3D Print Tabletop
image:image.image:caption: The ambush starts here — a hooded marksman with a heavy crossbow, perched above the road waiting for the carts to roll into the kill-zone. The first bolt is yours; the rest is the gang's.

image:image.image:title: Bandit Crossbowman STL — DnD Fantasy Highway Robber Sniper Miniature 3D Print Tabletop
image:image.image:caption: The ambush starts here — a hooded marksman with a heavy crossbow, perched above the road waiting for the carts to roll into the kill-zone. The first bolt is yours; the rest is the gang's.

image:image.image:title: Bandit Rogue STL — DnD Fantasy Twin Daggers Cutpurse Miniature 3D Print Tabletop RPG
image:image.image:caption: Twin daggers, low hood, the kind of bandit who waits until the Captain is done bluffing and the Brute is done swinging — then slips around the rear of the party with a smile.

image:image.image:title: Bandit Rogue STL — DnD Fantasy Twin Daggers Cutpurse Miniature 3D Print Tabletop RPG
image:image.image:caption: Twin daggers, low hood, the kind of bandit who waits until the Captain is done bluffing and the Brute is done swinging — then slips around the rear of the party with a smile.

image:image.image:caption: Twin daggers, low hood, the kind of bandit who waits until the Captain is done bluffing and the Brute is done swinging — then slips around the rear of the party with a smile.

image:image.image:caption: Twin daggers, low hood, the kind of bandit who waits until the Captain is done bluffing and the Brute is done swinging — then slips around the rear of the party with a smile.

image:image.image:title: Bandit Sorcerer STL — DnD Fantasy Hexer Outlaw Mage Miniature 3D Print Tabletop RPG
image:image.image:caption: The hex-witch of the gang — half her face hidden behind a brass mask, the other half whispering curses into the wind. The wagon-drivers never see her until the horses already refuse to move.

image:image.image:title: Bandit Sorcerer STL — DnD Fantasy Hexer Outlaw Mage Miniature 3D Print Tabletop RPG
image:image.image:caption: The hex-witch of the gang — half her face hidden behind a brass mask, the other half whispering curses into the wind. The wagon-drivers never see her until the horses already refuse to move.

image:image.image:title: Bandit Swordsman STL — DnD Fantasy Highway Robber Duelist Miniature 3D Print Tabletop
image:image.image:caption: The swordsman of the gang — disciplined longsword, dueling stance, the polite-looking bandit who insists you 'leave the gold and the horse, please'. Always the second voice in a negotiation.

image:image.image:title: Bandit Swordsman STL — DnD Fantasy Highway Robber Duelist Miniature 3D Print Tabletop
image:image.image:caption: The swordsman of the gang — disciplined longsword, dueling stance, the polite-looking bandit who insists you 'leave the gold and the horse, please'. Always the second voice in a negotiation.

image:image.image:caption: Baphomet in arcane stance — mage variant, channeling hellfire through twisted horns. A spell-casting take on Ragnarok Online's iconic Hidden Temple MVP, ideal for sorcerer/warlock-themed demon encount

image:image.image:title: Forest Slime STL — DnD Fantasy Ooze Monster Miniature 3D Print Tabletop RPG
image:image.image:caption: A wandering forest-ooze — moss, bark fragments, the occasional bone suspended inside translucent green. Slow, persistent, hard to wound, and impossible to ignore.

image:image.image:title: Four-Armed Monster STL — DnD Fantasy Aberration Miniature 3D Print Tabletop RPG
image:image.image:caption: A nightmare from the underdeep — four-armed, multi-jointed, all teeth and reach. The kind of monster a wizard makes when curiosity outpaces ethics.

image:image.image:title: Four-Armed Monster STL — DnD Fantasy Aberration Miniature 3D Print Tabletop RPG
image:image.image:caption: A nightmare from the underdeep — four-armed, multi-jointed, all teeth and reach. The kind of monster a wizard makes when curiosity outpaces ethics.

image:image.image:title: Giant Earth Worm STL — DnD Fantasy Purple Worm Miniature 3D Print Tabletop Boss
image:image.image:caption: A massive burrowing worm — armored segments, ring of teeth, the apex predator of the deep tunnels. The kind of encounter that turns into a chase the moment you hear it dig.

image:image.image:title: Giant Earth Worm STL — DnD Fantasy Purple Worm Miniature 3D Print Tabletop Boss
image:image.image:caption: A massive burrowing worm — armored segments, ring of teeth, the apex predator of the deep tunnels. The kind of encounter that turns into a chase the moment you hear it dig.

image:image.image:title: Haunted House STL — DnD Fantasy Diorama Scenery Terrain 3D Print Tabletop Halloween
image:image.image:caption: A crooked, broken-down manor — boarded windows, sagging porch, the silhouette of something watching from upstairs. The cursed centerpiece of every haunted-village adventure.

image:image.image:title: Haunted House STL — DnD Fantasy Diorama Scenery Terrain 3D Print Tabletop Halloween
image:image.image:caption: A crooked, broken-down manor — boarded windows, sagging porch, the silhouette of something watching from upstairs. The cursed centerpiece of every haunted-village adventure.

image:image.image:title: Horned Giant STL — DnD Fantasy Mountain Giant Boss Miniature 3D Print Tabletop
image:image.image:caption: A mountain-born giant with stag-like horns and arms thick as oaks. Hill Giant lineage with a fey-touched twist — older than the kingdom, slower to anger, hard to kill once roused.

image:image.image:title: Horned Giant STL — DnD Fantasy Mountain Giant Boss Miniature 3D Print Tabletop
image:image.image:caption: A mountain-born giant with stag-like horns and arms thick as oaks. Hill Giant lineage with a fey-touched twist — older than the kingdom, slower to anger, hard to kill once roused.

image:image.image:title: Minotaur Dual Axe STL — DnD Fantasy Labyrinth Boss Miniature 3D Print Tabletop RPG
image:image.image:caption: A minotaur berserker wielding twin battle-axes — a labyrinth-guardian with no respect for surrender. Carved muscle, broken horns, the calm of a creature that has killed everything it has ever met.

image:image.image:title: Minotaur Dual Axe STL — DnD Fantasy Labyrinth Boss Miniature 3D Print Tabletop RPG
image:image.image:caption: A minotaur berserker wielding twin battle-axes — a labyrinth-guardian with no respect for surrender. Carved muscle, broken horns, the calm of a creature that has killed everything it has ever met.

image:image.image:title: Minotaur Greataxe STL — DnD Fantasy Labyrinth Boss Miniature 3D Print Tabletop
image:image.image:caption: A minotaur warrior bearing a two-handed greataxe taller than a man. Pure stopping power — one charge and most adventurers learn what a labyrinth is for.

image:image.image:title: Minotaur Greataxe STL — DnD Fantasy Labyrinth Boss Miniature 3D Print Tabletop
image:image.image:caption: A minotaur warrior bearing a two-handed greataxe taller than a man. Pure stopping power — one charge and most adventurers learn what a labyrinth is for.

image:image.image:title: Minotaur Greataxe STL — DnD Fantasy Labyrinth Boss Miniature 3D Print Tabletop
image:image.image:caption: A minotaur warrior bearing a two-handed greataxe taller than a man. Pure stopping power — one charge and most adventurers learn what a labyrinth is for.

image:image.image:title: Minotaur Greataxe STL — DnD Fantasy Labyrinth Boss Miniature 3D Print Tabletop
image:image.image:caption: A minotaur warrior bearing a two-handed greataxe taller than a man. Pure stopping power — one charge and most adventurers learn what a labyrinth is for.

image:image.image:title: Minotaur Greataxe STL — DnD Fantasy Labyrinth Boss Miniature 3D Print Tabletop
image:image.image:caption: A minotaur warrior bearing a two-handed greataxe taller than a man. Pure stopping power — one charge and most adventurers learn what a labyrinth is for.

image:image.image:title: Minotaur Morning Star STL — DnD Fantasy Labyrinth Brute Miniature 3D Print Tabletop
image:image.image:caption: A minotaur brute swinging a massive spiked morning star. The kind of enemy who treats armor like a recommendation and shields like furniture.

image:image.image:title: Minotaur Morning Star STL — DnD Fantasy Labyrinth Brute Miniature 3D Print Tabletop
image:image.image:caption: A minotaur brute swinging a massive spiked morning star. The kind of enemy who treats armor like a recommendation and shields like furniture.

image:image.image:title: Minotaur Mage STL — DnD Fantasy Bull Shaman Spellcaster Miniature 3D Print Tabletop
image:image.image:caption: A minotaur shaman — robes, ritual staff, gold rings hanging from twisted horns. The lore-keeper and spellcaster of the labyrinth tribe, channeling the maze itself as a god.

image:image.image:title: Minotaur Mage STL — DnD Fantasy Bull Shaman Spellcaster Miniature 3D Print Tabletop
image:image.image:caption: A minotaur shaman — robes, ritual staff, gold rings hanging from twisted horns. The lore-keeper and spellcaster of the labyrinth tribe, channeling the maze itself as a god.

image:image.image:title: Minotaur Spear STL — DnD Fantasy Bull Lancer Miniature 3D Print Tabletop RPG
image:image.image:caption: A minotaur lancer — long spear for reach, hooves planted, ready to receive a charge. Less subtle than a guard, more elegant than a brute. The disciplined face of a labyrinth garrison.

image:image.image:title: Minotaur Spear STL — DnD Fantasy Bull Lancer Miniature 3D Print Tabletop RPG
image:image.image:caption: A minotaur lancer — long spear for reach, hooves planted, ready to receive a charge. Less subtle than a guard, more elegant than a brute. The disciplined face of a labyrinth garrison.

image:image.image:title: Minotaur Trident STL — DnD Fantasy Bull Gladiator Miniature 3D Print Tabletop RPG
image:image.image:caption: A minotaur gladiator with a heavy trident — survivor of a hundred arena fights, now turned mercenary or labyrinth-guardian for hire. The trident-and-net energy of an ancient bull-headed retiarius.

image:image.image:title: Minotaur Trident STL — DnD Fantasy Bull Gladiator Miniature 3D Print Tabletop RPG
image:image.image:caption: A minotaur gladiator with a heavy trident — survivor of a hundred arena fights, now turned mercenary or labyrinth-guardian for hire. The trident-and-net energy of an ancient bull-headed retiarius.

image:image.image:title: Minotaur Warband Bundle 6 STL — DnD Fantasy Labyrinth Pack Miniatures 3D Print
image:image.image:caption: A full minotaur warband in one pack — 6 different labyrinth-guardians, each with a distinct weapon and role. Dual axes, greataxe, spear, morning star, trident and a shaman/mage to complete the lineup.

image:image.image:title: Orc Archer STL — Ragnarok Online Inspired Orc Bowman Miniature for DnD 3D Print Tabletop
image:image.image:caption: An orc skirmisher with a heavy war-bow and a quiver of barbed arrows. Inspired by the Orc Archers patrolling the Orc Village fields in Ragnarok Online — the ranged threat in every orc warband.

image:image.image:caption: The classic Orc Warrior — broad shoulders, scarred chest, a one-handed axe ready for the fight. Inspired by the standard Orc Warrior mobs of Ragnarok Online's Orc Village and Orc Dungeon.

image:image.image:title: Orc Lady STL — Ragnarok Online Inspired Female Orc Warrior Miniature for DnD 3D Print
image:image.image:caption: The Orc Lady — fierce female orc warrior, often the matriarch of the warband or a shaman-queen. A staple of the Orc Village in Ragnarok Online, she carries the Orcish Voucher dropped by champions.

image:image.image:title: Orc Lord STL — Ragnarok Online Inspired MVP Boss Miniature for DnD 3D Print Tabletop
image:image.image:caption: The Orc Lord — supreme warlord of the orcish nations. Crown of bone, two-handed axe, plate armor torn from human knights. Inspired by Ragnarok Online's classic MVP boss who rules the Orc Dungeon.

image:image.image:title: Road Bandits Pack 6 STL — DnD Fantasy Highway Robber Ambush Bundle 3D Print Tabletop
image:image.image:caption: A full highway-bandit gang in one pack — six premium-detail outlaws ready to ambush the party on any forest road. Captain, crossbowman, hex-mage, axe-brute, twin-dagger rogue, and a duelist swordsman.
